description: This file defines a utility object StringUtils that provides methods to join a LinkedList into a String and split a String into a LinkedList, utilizing external utilities JoinUtils and SplitUtils.

classes.name: StringUtils
classes.description: A utility singleton object providing string manipulation functions involving LinkedList.

methods.name: join
methods.description: Converts a LinkedList into a String by delegating to JoinUtils.join.

methods.name: split
methods.description: Splits a String into a LinkedList by delegating to SplitUtils.split.
